queries.name: Accounts with a Balance
queries.description: A query to track if a person in TBBRACD has an outstanding balance, denoted by a negative balance after all transactions are added.

columns.name: TBRACCD_PIDM
columns.description: Internal Identification Number of the person or non-person account, valid in SPRIDEN.

columns.name: TBRACCD_TRAN_NUMBER
columns.description: Transaction number (one-up within entity) of the transaction.

columns.name: TBRACCD_TERM_CODE
columns.description: Term associated with the transaction. For student transactions valid in STVTERM, or ARTERM for non-student transactions.

columns.name: TBRACCD_DETAIL_CODE
columns.description: Detail code associated with the transaction, valid in TBBDETC.

columns.name: TBRACCD_USER
columns.description: User ID of the cashier who created the transaction.

columns.name: TBRACCD_ENTRY_DATE
columns.description: Entry date and time of the transaction, when initially created.

columns.name: TBRACCD_AMOUNT
columns.description: Amount of the transaction.

columns.name: TBRACCD_BALANCE
columns.description: Balance remaining for the transaction, as adjusted by the application of payment process. A negative balance is a credit on the account; a positive balance is a charge.

columns.name: TBRACCD_EFFECTIVE_DATE
columns.description: Effective date of the transaction used to calculate amount due, determine placement on the bill, and control feed to finance system based on Accounts Receivable System Control setting.

columns.name: TBRACCD_BILL_DATE
columns.description: Date that the transaction is billed.

columns.name: TBRACCD_DUE_DATE
columns.description: Due date set when the transaction is billed.

columns.name: TBRACCD_DESC
columns.description: Free-form description associated with the transaction. Default value comes from the Detail Code description (TBBDETC).

columns.name: TBRACCD_RECEIPT_NUMBER
columns.description: Receipt number associated with the transaction, if generated when the transaction was created.

columns.name: TBRACCD_TRAN_NUMBER_PAID
columns.description: Transaction Number Paid is used in application of payment to force this transaction to liquidate a specific transaction on the account.

columns.name: TBRACCD_CROSSREF_PIDM
columns.description: Cross Reference internal identification number. Associates student and third party sponsor (source code C) or student and lender (source code F), valid in SPRIDEN.

columns.name: TBRACCD_CROSSREF_NUMBER
columns.description: Cross Reference Number for third party transactions (contract number when source code is C), exemption credits (exemption number when source code is E), or deposits released (deposit transaction number when source code is D).

columns.name: TBRACCD_CROSSREF_DETAIL_CODE
columns.description: Cross Reference Detail Code for contract or exemption credits calculated based on detail code rules, valid in TBBDETC.

columns.name: TBRACCD_SRCE_CODE
columns.description: Source of the transaction when created on the account, including registration, housing, deposit, user entered, and so on. The default value is user entered transaction (T), valid in TTVSRCE.

columns.name: TBRACCD_ACCT_FEED_IND
columns.description: Status of the transaction in the accounting feed. Valid values are: Y - Feed transaction, F - Transaction fed, N - Do not feed transaction.

columns.name: TBRACCD_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.description: The last date this row was created or updated.

columns.name: TBRACCD_SESSION_NUMBER
columns.description: Cashier session number in which this transaction was posted (0 = current session).

columns.name: TBRACCD_CSHR_END_DATE
columns.description: End date and time of the cashiering session for this transaction.

columns.name: TBRACCD_CRN
columns.description: Course Reference Number (CRN) of the course which generated the charge, when Track by CRN is used in Fee Assessment.

columns.name: TBRACCD_CROSSREF_SRCE_CODE
columns.description: Cross Reference Source for contract or exemption credits, valid in TTVSRCE.

columns.name: TBRACCD_LOC_MDT
columns.description: Location Management Type. Valid values are M for monthly charges, T for term-based charges, or D for daily charges.

columns.name: TBRACCD_LOC_MDT_SEQ
columns.description: Location Management sequence in which monthly charges were added. Used in subsequent processing to calculate adjustments.

columns.name: TBRACCD_RATE
columns.description: A per-unit rate used to calculate the amount. Optional for non-student transactions; not allowed for student transactions.

columns.name: TBRACCD_UNITS
columns.description: Number of Units is multiplied by the specified Rate to calculate the amount. Optional for non-student transactions; not allowed for student transactions.

columns.name: TBRACCD_DOCUMENT_NUMBER
columns.description: Document number that references a source document for the transaction.

columns.name: TBRACCD_TRANS_DATE
columns.description: Transaction date used by the finance system to control posting to the ledgers.

columns.name: TBRACCD_PAYMENT_ID
columns.description: Free-form information identifying a payment; often used to record check or credit card number.

columns.name: TBRACCD_INVOICE_NUMBER
columns.description: Invoice Number identifies a group of charges invoiced via one statement.

columns.name: TBRACCD_STATEMENT_DATE
columns.description: The date a statement was generated.

columns.name: TBRACCD_INV_NUMBER_PAID
columns.description: Invoice Number Paid is used in application of payment to force a payment to liquidate a specific group of charges.

columns.name: TBRACCD_CURR_CODE
columns.description: Foreign currency code used when creating a payment, valid in GTVCURR and GURCURR.

columns.name: TBRACCD_EXCHANGE_DIFF
columns.description: Exchange difference between a foreign currency amount as of the date entered and the value 1) as of the bill date when processed with Invoice Number Paid or 2) as of the charge transaction date when processed with Transaction Number Paid.

columns.name: TBRACCD_FOREIGN_AMOUNT
columns.description: Amount of the transaction stated in foreign currency.

columns.name: TBRACCD_LATE_DCAT_CODE
columns.description: Category of the late charge detail code, valid in TTVDCAT.

columns.name: TBRACCD_FEED_DATE
columns.description: Date this transaction was fed to the finance system.

columns.name: TBRACCD_FEED_DOC_CODE
columns.description: Document code used to feed this transaction to the finance system.

columns.name: TBRACCD_ATYP_CODE
columns.description: In combination with ATYP_SEQNO, the address where the bill for this transaction will be sent. Required for non-student transactions; not allowed for student transactions. Valid in STVATYP.

columns.name: TBRACCD_ATYP_SEQNO
columns.description: In combination with ATYP_CODE, the address where the bill for this transaction will be sent. Required for non-student transactions; not allowed for student transactions. Combination valid and active in SPRADDR.

columns.name: TBRACCD_CARD_TYPE_VR
columns.description: Credit Card Type used for Voice Response messages, valid in TTVCCRD.

columns.name: TBRACCD_CARD_EXP_DATE_VR
columns.description: Credit card expiration date supplied at time of credit card payment.

columns.name: TBRACCD_CARD_AUTH_NUMBER_VR
columns.description: Credit card authorization number received when transaction was processed.

columns.name: TBRACCD_CROSSREF_DCAT_CODE
columns.description: Cross Reference Category Code for contract or exemption credits calculated based on category code rules, valid in TTVDCAT.

columns.name: TBRACCD_ORIG_CHG_IND
columns.description: Indicates that the transaction is to be considered as an original charge for the Title IV recalculation process, as opposed to subsequent adjustments due to withdrawal. Valid values are Y (original) or null.

columns.name: TBRACCD_CCRD_CODE
columns.description: Code identifying Credit Card Type used in authorizations via gateway, valid in GTVCCRD.

columns.name: TBRACCD_MERCHANT_ID
columns.description: Merchant ID associated with the Process Name Code, Credit Card Type Code, and System Code. The Merchant ID is included in the credit card payment request transmitted to the vendor handling credit card payments.

columns.name: TBRACCD_TAX_REPT_YEAR
columns.description: Tax Year in which the transaction was reported on form 1098-T.

columns.name: TBRACCD_TAX_REPT_BOX
columns.description: TAX REPORT BOX: Tax Report Box in which the transaction was reported on form 1098T for tax year prior to 2018 or towards max amount for Payments Received after 2017. Values (CB) Qualified Charges Billed, (AC) Adjustments to Prior Charges.

columns.name: TBRACCD_TAX_AMOUNT
columns.description: Tax Amount as reported on form 1098-T. Sign relates pay type to report box, and may be pro-rated based on allocation rules.

columns.name: TBRACCD_TAX_FUTURE_IND
columns.description: TAX FUTURE IND: Tax Report Future Indicator is valued with Y if the transaction was reported on form 1098-T as a term beginning in a future tax year for rule CB, or null.

columns.name: TBRACCD_DATA_ORIGIN
columns.description: Source system that last created or updated the data.

columns.name: TBRACCD_CREATE_SOURCE
columns.description: Source system that initially created the record.

columns.name: TBRACCD_CPDT_IND
columns.description: Indicates that contract payment detail is used for application of a payment to contract charges (Y or NULL).

columns.name: TBRACCD_AIDY_CODE
columns.description: AID YEAR: The aid year associated with the Financial Aid disbursement.

columns.name: TBRACCD_STSP_KEY_SEQUENCE
columns.description: STUDY PATH SEQUENCE: Key sequence of the study path for the course registration.

columns.name: TBRACCD_PERIOD
columns.description: PERIOD: The enrollment period code for the.Financial Aid disbursement.

columns.name: TBRACCD_TAX_REPT_BOX_PR
columns.description: TAX REPT BOX PR: Tax Report Box in which the transaction was eligible for reporting on the form 1098T. Values (PR) Qualified Payments Received, (AP) Adjustments to Payments Received.

columns.name: TBRACCD_TAX_REPT_BOX_SG
columns.description: TAX REPT BOX SG: Tax Report Box in which the transaction was reported on the form 1098T. Values (SG) Scholarship or Grant, (AS) Adjustments to Scholarship or Grant.

columns.name: TBRACCD_TAX_FUTURE_IND_PR
columns.description: TAX FUTURE IND PR: Tax Report Future Indicator is valued with Y if the transaction was reported on form 1098-T as a term beginning in a future tax year for rule PR, or null.

columns.name: TBRACCD_TAX_FUTURE_IND_SG
columns.description: TAX FUTURE IND SG: Tax Report Future Indicator is valued with Y if the transaction was reported on form 1098-T as a term beginning in a future tax year for rule SG, or null.

columns.name: TBRACCD_SURROGATE_ID
columns.description: SURROGATE ID: Immutable unique key

columns.name: TBRACCD_VERSION
columns.description: VERSION: Optimistic lock token.

columns.name: TBRACCD_USER_ID
columns.description: USER ID: The user ID of the person who inserted or last updated this record.

columns.name: TBRACCD_VPDI_CODE
columns.description: VPDI CODE: Multi-entity processing code.
